title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Guide to Effective and Safe Practice in Youth Mentoring, Aotearoa New Zealand, 2nd Edition Publication date: 29 June 2016 This Guide is a useful resource for anyone supporting youth development including: mentoring, and youth development programme providers, social service agencies that deliver mentoring services, school based mentoring programmes and funders. Publication Youth health Mental health

## Guide to Effective and Safe Practice in Youth Mentoring, Aotearoa New Zealand, 2nd Edition
This Guide is a useful resource for anyone supporting youth development including: mentoring, and youth development programme providers, social service agencies that deliver mentoring services, school based mentoring programmes and funders.
- Demographic Report on Clients Allocated the Ministry of Health’s Disability Support Services as at September 2014 Publication date: 20 June 2016 This publication presents aggregated demographic information about the people with disabilities who have been allocated Ministry of Health funded disability supports. The report presents demographics that relate to specific service types, for example, respite, residential, and specific disability types, for example, physical, intellectual, autism spectrum disorder. Publication Disability Disability support Intellectual disabilities

## Demographic Report on Clients Allocated the Ministry of Health’s Disability Support Services as at September 2014
This publication presents aggregated demographic information about the people with disabilities who have been allocated Ministry of Health funded disability supports. The report presents demographics that relate to specific service types, for example, respite, residential, and specific disability types, for example, physical, intellectual, autism spectrum disorder.
- Intellectual disabilities
- Pharmacy Action Plan 2016 to 2020 Publication date: 3 June 2016 The Pharmacy Action Plan describes a future in which pharmacist services, as an essential part of a people-powered integrated model of care, are delivered in innovative ways, across a broad range of settings, so that all New Zealanders have equitable access to medicines and health care services Publication Medicine issues

## Pharmacy Action Plan 2016 to 2020
The Pharmacy Action Plan describes a future in which pharmacist services, as an essential part of a people-powered integrated model of care, are delivered in innovative ways, across a broad range of settings, so that all New Zealanders have equitable access to medicines and health care services
- National Review of Outreach Immunisation Services: Summary and Recommendations Publication date: 30 May 2016 Outreach Immunisation Services (OIS) are an important tool for increasing childhood immunisation coverage. In order to identify the most effective and cost-effective approaches to OIS, the Ministry contracted the Immunisation Advisory Centre (IMAC) to carry out a national review of OIS in 2015. Publication Immunisation

## National Review of Outreach Immunisation Services: Summary and Recommendations
Outreach Immunisation Services (OIS) are an important tool for increasing childhood immunisation coverage. In order to identify the most effective and cost-effective approaches to OIS, the Ministry contracted the Immunisation Advisory Centre (IMAC) to carry out a national review of OIS in 2015.
- Final Evaluation of the Northern Regional Accelerated Sonography Training Pilot 2014 to 2016 Publication date: 30 May 2016 In 2013, Health Workforce New Zealand commissioned the Northern Regional Alliance of District Health Boards to manage a pilot of an innovative approach to training sonographers developed by The University of Auckland. Publication Workforce

## Final Evaluation of the Northern Regional Accelerated Sonography Training Pilot 2014 to 2016
In 2013, Health Workforce New Zealand commissioned the Northern Regional Alliance of District Health Boards to manage a pilot of an innovative approach to training sonographers developed by The University of Auckland.
- Strategy to Prevent and Minimise Gambling Harm 2016/17 to 2018/19 Publication date: 27 May 2016 This document sets out the Ministry’s approach to and budget for funding and coordinating services to prevent and minimise gambling harm for the three year period starting 1 July 2016. Publication Gambling harm

## Strategy to Prevent and Minimise Gambling Harm 2016/17 to 2018/19
This document sets out the Ministry’s approach to and budget for funding and coordinating services to prevent and minimise gambling harm for the three year period starting 1 July 2016.
- Review of the Benefits and Costs of Water Fluoridation in New Zealand Publication date: 27 May 2016 The Sapere Research Group has evaluated the benefits and costs of water fluoridation in New Zealand. Publication Drinking-water

## Review of the Benefits and Costs of Water Fluoridation in New Zealand
The Sapere Research Group has evaluated the benefits and costs of water fluoridation in New Zealand.
- Mental Health and Addiction: Service use 2012/13 Publication date: 12 May 2016 These tables present a summary of the mental health and addiction services provided in New Zealand in 2012/13. Included are the demographics of users of mental health and addiction services, the types of services provided, and outcomes of treatment. Publication Addiction Mental health Statistics

## Mental Health and Addiction: Service use 2012/13
These tables present a summary of the mental health and addiction services provided in New Zealand in 2012/13. Included are the demographics of users of mental health and addiction services, the types of services provided, and outcomes of treatment.
- An Exploratory Study of Pre-Commitment for Gambling in New Zealand Publication date: 6 May 2016 Pre-commitment is a method or system used by gamblers to set limits on how much time or money they spend on gambling before they start gambling. Publication Gambling research Gambling harm

## An Exploratory Study of Pre-Commitment for Gambling in New Zealand
Pre-commitment is a method or system used by gamblers to set limits on how much time or money they spend on gambling before they start gambling.
- New Zealand Maternity Clinical Indicators 2014 Publication date: 3 May 2016 The New Zealand Maternity Clinical Indicators present comparative maternity interventions and outcomes data for pregnant women and their babies by maternity facility and district health board region. Publication Maternity Statistics

## New Zealand Maternity Clinical Indicators 2014
The New Zealand Maternity Clinical Indicators present comparative maternity interventions and outcomes data for pregnant women and their babies by maternity facility and district health board region.
- Te Ohonga Ake : The Determinants of Health for Māori Children and Young People in New Zealand: Series Two Publication date: 29 April 2016 An overview of the underlying social determinants that influence the health and wellbeing of Māori children and young people. Publication Māori health Statistics

## Te Ohonga Ake : The Determinants of Health for Māori Children and Young People in New Zealand: Series Two
An overview of the underlying social determinants that influence the health and wellbeing of Māori children and young people.
- ’Ala Mo’ui Progress Report: December 2015 Publication date: 29 April 2016 ’Ala Mo’ui : Pathways to Pacific Health and Wellbeing 2014–18 is a four-year plan that provides an outcomes framework to deliver high-quality health services that meet the needs of Pacific peoples. This is the second six-monthly progress report on the implementation. Publication Pacific health

## ’Ala Mo’ui Progress Report: December 2015
’Ala Mo’ui : Pathways to Pacific Health and Wellbeing 2014–18 is a four-year plan that provides an outcomes framework to deliver high-quality health services that meet the needs of Pacific peoples. This is the second six-monthly progress report on the implementation.
- An Evaluation of the Reorientation of Child and Adolescent Oral Health Services Publication date: 22 April 2016 This report is an evaluation of the reorientation of child and adolescent oral health services, following the Government reinvestment in child and adolescent health to create the Community Oral Health Service. Publication Child health Youth health Oral health

## An Evaluation of the Reorientation of Child and Adolescent Oral Health Services
This report is an evaluation of the reorientation of child and adolescent oral health services, following the Government reinvestment in child and adolescent health to create the Community Oral Health Service.
- Demonstrating changes to disability support: Synthesis of evaluation findings 2012—2014 Publication date: 20 April 2016 This report provides an independent synthesis of the evaluation findings of the Demonstration of the New Model for Supporting Disabled People (the New Model) undertaken between 2012 and 2014 Publication Disability support

## Demonstrating changes to disability support: Synthesis of evaluation findings 2012—2014
This report provides an independent synthesis of the evaluation findings of the Demonstration of the New Model for Supporting Disabled People (the New Model) undertaken between 2012 and 2014
- Update of the New Zealand Health Strategy: Analysis of submissions Publication date: 18 April 2016 In November and December 2015 the Ministry of Health consulted publicly on the draft update of the New Zealand Health strategy. This summary provides an outline of what we heard. Publication Health system

## Update of the New Zealand Health Strategy: Analysis of submissions
In November and December 2015 the Ministry of Health consulted publicly on the draft update of the New Zealand Health strategy. This summary provides an outline of what we heard.
